mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visit_log ( visitor_key, us_num, visit_date, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, last_path ) VALUES ( #{visitorKey}, #{usNum}, CURRENT_DATE(), NOW(), NOW(), #{path} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE us_num = VALUES(us_num), last_seen_at = NOW(), last_path = VALUES(last_path)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM visit_log WHERE visitor_key = #{anonymousVisitorKey} AND visit_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND visit_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
